expected_signals.summary: SpaceXAI released Grok 4.5, its first model release since going public.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: has released its latest model, Grok 4.5

expected_signals.summary: Musk said the beta program produced strong positive customer feedback ahead of the public launch.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: strong positive feedback from customers in our beta test program

expected_signals.summary: SpaceXAI positioned Grok 4.5 as an Opus-class model that is faster, more token-efficient, and lower cost.
The article says SpaceXAI's benchmark results showed competitiveness with top rivals but not best-in-class performance.
SpaceXAI priced Grok 4.5 at $2 per million input tokens and $6 per million output tokens.

expected_signals.summary: The article says OpenAI's GPT 5.6 release had previously been limited by the Trump administration over security concerns.
